notableEvents.label: Isaac Collins reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Collins reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Isaac Collins to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi walks. Munetaka Murakami scores. Lenyn Sosa to 3rd. Edgar Quero to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Collins reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Isaac Collins to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error

notableEvents.label: Dustin Harris pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dustin Harris doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher John Schreiber. Dustin Harris scores. Miguel Vargas to 3rd. Munetaka Murakami to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dustin Harris pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dustin Harris grounds out to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.
